ground_truth.title: 7 SEO and AI Search Trends to Watch in 2026
ground_truth.author: Henry Purchase
ground_truth.main_content:
With 68% of online experiences starting with a search, ranking high in search engine results helps to generate leads for your business or brand. As AI reshapes the way search results appear and how people discover information online, staying updated with recent trends is essential. I'm Henry Purchase, founder of SEOSpace, the SEO extension for Squarespace. In this article, I'll cover seven key SEO and AI search trends for 2026, along with challenges and tips to stay ahead.

1. AI-first search: AI assistants like ChatGPT are transforming how people search, with AI expected to handle 25% of global queries by 2026. This shifts search results away from the traditional "10 blue links" model and toward direct answers that are personalized to a user's search history, preferences, and past behavior.

2. AI optimization and agentic AI: Traditional SEO remains essential, but AI optimization is fast emerging as its next frontier. By 2026, AI optimization (AEO, GEO, or AIO) will be as critical as SEO, driven by growing adoption of AI search and the rise of agentic AI.

3. Building brand reputation through user-generated content: Brand reputation influences not only traditional SEO, but also AI-driven search outcomes.
with: With 68% of online experiences starting with a search, ranking high in search engine results helps to generate leads for your business or brand.
AI assistants like ChatGPT are transforming how people search, with AI expected to handle 25% of global queries by 2026.
Once you try this yourself, it becomes clear why some people prefer AI-powered results.
